reason: Resizable unit widths is a live-input control (the [ / ] keys and a flank-grip drag). The resize rides the replay command stream, but none of the bundled replays exercise it, and recording one needs an interactive session. The static affordances -- the flank resize grips, the HUD 'Width: N files' readout, and a wide-vs-narrow formation contrast -- are shown by demos/shots/resizable-widths.png in the PR description instead.
